work_package_result.summary: Added the first durable local project-session journal: the embedded Head is the canonical writer, SQLite persists versioned append-only events with transactional revision checks, watch consumers receive snapshot plus monotonic deltas with explicit resync, and drafts remain a separate non-canonical cache.

passed: 10 SQLite adapter checks cover terminal-state reopen, transaction rollback, exact-envelope corruption, unsupported payload versions, future schemas, migration checksum mismatch, committed WAL recovery through a child process and non-canonical draft recovery
7 sync-core tests cover ordered snapshots and deltas, gap blocking, epoch invalidation, unavailable and revoked state, bounded sequence rules and stable draft command identity
3 memory-core tests cover deterministic event folding, changed-content idempotency rejection and immutable terminal history
3 Head session tests plus the embedded restart integration cover admission idempotency, monotonic watch state, lagged-stream resync and one-time recovered-draft submission
mise exec -- just check passed at executable-code head f0c8c932212e4e177db4362c78f64edf313a9123
GitHub Fast Gate runs 63 and 64 passed for the reviewed code head and the planning-only review head
not_run: physical power-loss, disk-full, permission-loss, antivirus-locking, sustained-load and multi-process-writer fault injection remain release-hardening obligations rather than claims of this bounded development profile
visible desktop restart and draft restoration remain WP-M01-007; authenticated desktop-to-Node IPC remains WP-M01-006
production encryption, backup and multi-device replication are outside WP-M01-005

review.method: Independent read-only R3 review of exact executable-code commit f0c8c932212e4e177db4362c78f64edf313a9123 against base 812cd6323d94abaa577761eb9026dc743c7c011d returned PASS; the owner then reviewed the behavior, test boundary and limitations and explicitly approved merge on 2026-07-19.
findings_closed: Required exact-byte checksums and explicit payload versions so corrupted or future events cannot be silently reinterpreted
Rejected cross-project command retries and preserved atomic rollback between event append and session-head revision
Required new-epoch handshakes and sequence-one snapshots before deltas can resume
Raised SQLite durability to WAL plus synchronous FULL and verified committed recovery through a real child process

migrations: adapters/storage/sqlite/migrations/0001_control_store.sql creates the versioned development control store and records its checksum
observability_changes: session revision, watch epoch and sequence, command correlation and recovery failures are observable without placing message content in metric labels
migration, integrity, stale-cursor and unsupported-version failures remain distinct
known_limitations: this is the first bounded development schema, not the final production backup, encryption or hardware-fault profile
SQLite is owned by one embedded Head process; multi-process canonical writers are not supported
desktop UI and local IPC are intentionally not connected by this package
follow_up_candidates: release-wide adversarial persistence and fault-injection hardening
